rows.label: qev015604_MSG0001
rows.name:
With a space as large as Regina-san's shop,
we should be able to install that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015604_MSG0002
rows.name:
Please set up the Frontier Net
in the Valley of Oblivion no matter what![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015604_SEL0021
rows.name: Do not add him to the party right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015604_MSG0012
rows.name:
Oho! I will help you, of course!
Waiting around doing nothing is not in my nature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015604_MSG0003
rows.name:
With the spirit of a single meal being worth a thousand pieces of gold,
I will absolutely repay my debt of gratitude to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015604_MSG0004
rows.name:
Just one more step and that will be complete!
Please gather the items Giogion requested.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015604_MSG0008
rows.name:
Oho! I will help you, of course!
Waiting around doing nothing is not in my nature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015604_MSG0005
rows.name:
Once that is complete, I am certain
it will be of use to everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015604_MSG0006
rows.name:
Come now, please open a device slot!
If there is something else you wish to open a slot in
besides the Attack Assault I gave you,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015604_MSG0007
rows.name:
that equipment is fine, too!
Do not worry! It is a device worked on by Giogion.
It is guaranteed to succeed![ST:wait ]
